title: Haven Bags
description: 7 Colored Bags with unique personal dimensions. Great for nomadic playstyles! Inspired by the MMORPG Wakfu.
body: ### [Please consider supporting me on ko-fi if you like the mod and can afford it, I appreciate even 1 dollar. ](https://ko-fi.com/raguto) --- _**I grant permission to anyone seeking to add my mod to a modpack**_ --- ### 📦 **Haven Bags Inspired by Wakfu's Haven Bags** 📦 Transform any bag into a portable haven dimension! Place colored haven bags to create your own personal pocket realms with expandable rooms, that's perfect for bases, farms, and storage. 🏠 **Your Personal Pocket Dimensions(_Nomadic Playstyle_)** Transform any bag into a portable haven dimension! Place colored haven bags to create your own personal pocket realms with expandable rooms, that's perfect for bases, farms, and storage. ✨ **Key Features:** 🎒 **7 Unique Bag Colors** - Black, Blue, Red, Green, White, Yellow, and Brown bags, each creating distinct personal dimensions, which you can also place inside of other haven bags, with ancestral chain support. 🏗️ **Expandable Havens** - Use haven gems to expand your dimension in 4 directions (Merchant, Deco, Crafty, Garden) 🔒 **Access Control** - Lock bags with leads for multiplayer security - only owners can enter locked bags or access the Bags GUI, as well as a string to block/allow mob access. 👥 **Entity Support** - Bring villagers, animals, and mobs into your haven dimension. 🧭 **Smart Teleportation** - Return positions stack for nested bag exploration. 🎨 **Color-Coded GUI** - Beautiful interface with transparent items on input slots. 🎮 **How to Use:** 1). Craft a colored haven bag and place it in your world ![Bags](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cfe87f37a3a6f82c4b40c6241274ff9be4ced9d_0.webp) 2). Right-click the bag to access the GUI ![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5dfb3bc3eab491bcc6cb66d8cfb96fa5ac348c11.png) 3). Add haven gems to bag slots for expansion ![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cc785cb70b4abc908ce606c2344564b185806e3.png) 4). Walk onto the bag to enter your personal haven ![dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59ed28d31e5ebd5b1eab4e74cd7d28044bf7cbb3_0.webp) 5). Exit the bag by jumping on the central square inside 6). Build farms, bases, or storage systems in your private dimension that persists! 7). Break your bag to pick it back up and go anywhere you like with your base inside **Recipes:** ![Crafty Gem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a33d5497aa6db334f2adb1cda50ce9c3a97346b3.png) ![Merchant Gem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef0be33f98e047b132b65bcca6ea12a49699b3a8.png) ![Deco Gem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/265fa94e6373b5f8a6b6fc2b3dcdad1c745055ac.png) ![Garden Gem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3070bfd52c1cef9b28c51f59b43ade13835f3d41.png) 🔧 **Technical Details:** Standalone dimension system - No conflicts with other mods Multiplayer compatible - UUID-based ownership Performance optimized - Event-driven structure generation No external mod dependancy or LIBs required Perfect for survival players who want a portable base, creative builders needing extra space, or server owners wanting private dimensions for players!
